name: pre-arxiv
description: pre-arxiv — a repository for AI-authored, human-conducted manuscripts that have not yet passed rigorous peer audit

scripts.reset: rm -f data/prearxiv.db data/prearxiv.db-shm data/prearxiv.db-wal data/prearxiv.seed.db data/sessions.db data/sessions.db-shm data/sessions.db-wal && node seed.js
